title: Xtra Quick Vietnamese Epoisses Ca Kho To
description: A quick-fix Vietnamese dish featuring epoisses cheese, this recipe is a herbal and shattering combination of flavors, perfect for a weeknight dinner. It is also ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly, making it a great option for those looking for a balancing meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, grated ginger, minced garlic, and chili flakes.
Stir the mixture until the sugar has dissolved and the mixture is fragrant.
Add the cubed tofu to the skillet and cook until it is golden brown on all sides.
Add the softened epoisses cheese to the skillet and stir until it is melted and well combined with the tofu and sauce.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for a few minutes until it has thickened slightly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the ca kho to hot over steamed vegetables or rice.
Garnish with chopped herbs, such as cilantro or basil, if desired.
